title: Sign Fix
description: Prevents text rendering on signs from more than 10 blocks away to improve performance
body:
This mod prevents text on signs from rendering when you are more than 10 blocks away to improve performance in areas with many signs such as a storage system.

Before:
![Bad for performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f5173f365d94db52b55abb2e78eab62ffa595f.png)

After: 
![Good for performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fd9ee563ad915b113a8a8baa7520f7e0653c7d1.png)
